# Expected files after /goal runs
#
# NONE in this fixture's output dir. /goal is a memory-write skill: its single
# durable artifact is `.itd-memory/GOAL.json` in the TARGET project (schema:
# docs/templates/itd-memory/goal.schema.json), plus unit events appended to
# `.itd-memory/events.jsonl`. It never scaffolds project files itself — code
# changes inside a unit are produced by the standard /task pipeline the unit is
# driven through, under that pipeline's own gates.
#
# Verify the artifact manually in a target project:
#
#   python3 scripts/validate_state.py <project>/.itd-memory/GOAL.json
#
# /goal MUST NOT:
#   - Write project source files directly (units go through /task)
#   - Write the /tmp/claude-review-done-* marker (that belongs to /review)
#   - Recreate an existing active GOAL.json (resume-only)
#
# Validation deferred (status: pending) — same memory-write bucket as
# fixture-09-session-save and fixture-18-handoff. Manual verification via
# notes.md.
